overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest path at night. The character travels from an open moonlit woodland area past stone ruins and a campfire, into increasingly dense and foggy forest interior.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through the moonlit forest, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
tall pine trees lining the left side of the path
tall pine trees lining the right side of the path
bright moon visible through scattered clouds in the night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through an open forest at night. The moon is visible in the sky above the pine trees lining both sides of the trail, casting soft blue light across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with ancient stone ruins

events.description: stone wall ruins come into view on the right side of the path
warm orange glow from a distant campfire becomes visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing by the stone ruins and approaching the campfire light

entered.detail: ancient stone wall ruins running alongside the path
burning campfire with visible flames and embers

segments.scene_description: The path continues past ancient stone wall ruins on the right. A warm campfire glow becomes visible in the distance ahead, contrasting with the cool moonlight and illuminating the nearby trees.

events.description: passing the campfire and entering a significantly denser section of forest
moonlight becomes obscured by the dense tree canopy, making the scene darker

agents.ego_description: walking through increasingly dense forest with thick tree coverage on both sides

segments.scene_description: Passing the campfire, the forest becomes significantly denser with thick underbrush and closely packed trees. The stone ruins fall behind as the path winds deeper into the woods, blocking much of the moonlight and creating a darker atmosphere.

events.description: atmospheric fog or mist becomes visible drifting between the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing through the dark, foggy forest interior with limited visibility

entered.detail: mist or fog visible between the tree trunks in the distance

segments.scene_description: The forest grows even darker and more enclosed. Atmospheric fog drifts between the densely packed trees in the distance, creating a mysterious and moody atmosphere as the journey continues deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit woodland that gradually transforms into a dense, fog-shrouded wilderness. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path under a clear night sky, where the moon casts a soft blue light across the surrounding pine trees. As the journey continues, the camera passes ancient stone wall ruins while a warm campfire glow emerges in the distance, contrasting with the cool nocturnal tones. The scene then shifts as the path winds deeper into the woods, leaving the ruins behind and moving past the fire into a region of thick underbrush and closely packed trees that block out the moonlight. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly enclosed and dark, with atmospheric fog drifting between the trees to create a mysterious and moody atmosphere.
